name: Talbert Ottoman Olive Velvet - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Plywood Frame, No Assembly, Spot Clean
description:
Anchor your space in chic, functional style with this Talbert Velvet Ottoman from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. Set atop a wooden frame with four castor legs, this rectangular ottoman is upholstered with a softly-textured velvet fabric with an extra layer of padding to offer comfy seating. Place it by an accent chair to rest your current book, or to provide extra seating to family and friends.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
